hero.headline: Run your trade business from your phone
hero.sub: Quotes, jobs, and invoices in one place. Built for Danish electricians, plumbers, and carpenters.

features.headline: Everything you need. Nothing you don't.

jobs.title: Track every job
jobs.desc: From first site visit to final invoice. Never lose track of work in progress.

quotes.title: Professional quotes
quotes.desc: Generate PDF quotes on the spot. Send them directly from the job site.

invoices.title: Get paid faster
invoices.desc: Send invoices and track what's owed. Danish VAT handled automatically.

pricing.headline: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.sub: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready.
